response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrated Java proficiency in recent roles, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level experience incompatible with an entry-level role, raising concerns about overqualification, cultural fit, and salary expectations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong contributions to open-source and community-driven tech initiatives
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting required fluency
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, not entry-level
Recent work is primarily in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with minimal recent Java exposure
